title: Im out of the loop
wikitext:
[]: I'm out of the loop. Post by zeaven » Fri Feb 09, 2007 5:19 am As you probably [don't] know, I haven't been posting here for a while, and so I may have missed any information about the new project. Is there any post in this forum that serves as a sort of collection of links/articles about the new work? If not, maybe someone could turn this into one? It would be nice to be able to get a sort of aggregate measure of all the rumors, progress, etc. I've been browsing some new posts and some things have been alluded to of which I had no idea.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Feb 09, 2007 8:26 am Please review these threads: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1566 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2053 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2364
